name: BGP.Tools Route Collector
notes:
This is the route collector AS for bgp.tools. It does not carry traffic (apart from rare situations where it sends a single IPv6 prefix to a route server for backup reach-ability) on it's BGP sessions.

When peering with bgp.tools AS212232 you should export a full table (1M routes IPv4, 200k routes IPv6) like you would export to a potential customer. 

If you do not then bgp.tools will not be able to calculate your network statistics and the sessions may be removed to recover capacity. There are certain situations where internal resource shortages may mean not all prefixes are accepted/imported, but please export the full table regardless so this can be dynamically managed on our end!
